title: pentaraphia calycosa
intro: Pentaraphia calycosa, also known as the Fivefold Calyx or Pentaraphia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Pentaraphia calycosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, with its leaves and roots being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
